title: Binca Vidou Reed Diffuser Set - Mixed Fragrance of Bergamot, Vanilla, Lavender and Jasmine for Bedroom Living Room Office Essential Oil Diffuser for Stress Relief 100ml/3.4oz
features: Sophisticated Scented Oil Diffuser - Crafted with Fragrance Notes of Jasmine, Bergamot, Vanilla, Lavender, etc (flowers not included). An instant fragrance room freshener that smells rich and natural. No smoke, flame-free, rejuvenate with this smooth and peaceful scent.

A Modern Air Freshener - Fiber reeds absorb the fruity & floral scent fragrance oils and release an evocative fragrance in the air for at least 50 days. The simple yet Elegant Artistic bottle looks like a Work of Art! Makes a Beautiful Complement to any Home Decor.

Easy Intensity Control - 8 fiber reeds with 100ml concentrated high-quality fragrance oil. By adding or removing the sticks from the bottle, you can control the intensity of the fragrance, or flip them regularly for a burst of fresh scent.

Perfect Gift Idea - Decorative design and smooth aroma make the ideal gift for friends and loved ones, for housewarmings, birthdays, and anniversaries. It's always a pleasure to see everyone receive the product and smile with joy.

Odor Elimination - Scent your space with natural and sweet fruity and floral fragrances to eliminate the bad smells. Put it in the bedroom. living room, bathroom, kitchen, hallway, and office to add a fresh smell and fashion to the environment.
description: Product Description With a love of interiors, flair for design and intuition of trends, we have gained so much popularity in home fragrances around the world. Our scents add a dash of luxury to your every day, and style to your space. Flowers are stretching its body elegantly under the touch of the breeze. And then it starts to dance and the swaying body lets people be reveling greatly. The combination of the flower and the wind is so vivid that presents a rich spiritual. The wind brings a sense of spirituality to the flower. On the other hand, the flower gives its aromatic to the wind in return. The wind is dancing in the flower and the flower moves gently with the wind. Together it gives people a splendid and amazing sensual pleasure. The freshness of the top note bergamot combines with the herb fragrance of the bottom note vanilla perfectly to create a natural smell that makes people feel like being in nature and covered by the overflowing fragrance. It‘s worth mentioning that the middle note of this reed diffuser consists of unique lavender and special jasmine originated in China. Not only it presents the elegant western temperament, but it also includes the classic eastern romantic charm. Those special qualities make both fragrances seeps and blends mutually. The graceful lavender aroma precipitates flawlessly in the eastern jasmine with a long and quiet finish. Natural Ingredient Brings Natural Fragrance Welcome to Binca Vidou. We invite you to discover an extraordinary fragrance collection that speaks to your sense of style while imparting the‘Compound Floral and Fruity’with unexpected flair. A fragrance that is as memorable as it is luxurious. BincaVidou Compound Fruits & Flowers reed diffuser embraces all that is graceful and exquisite with lush notes of smooth Jasmine , sheer Bergamot , heady Vanilla , lavish Vanilla and subtle Lavender . A must-have for any Floral and Fruity fragrance lover! Binca Vidou has become beloved by so many for its special blend of fragrances and accessories. Always seeking new ways to decorate with fragrance, we stay true to our founder’s mission of creating the‘Scent of Memories' to captivate and illuminate. Mordern, Aromatic, Luxurious Adding scent to your space is one of the best luxuries. Nothing makes a place seem more romantic, cozy, or sophisticated than the right scent. Scenting the surroundings makes you feel completely pampered but really doesn’t cost very much. If you're familiar with reed diffusers, you know that no matter the season, you'll be able to enjoy nature’s freshest scents. With Binca Vidou reed diffusers, you can enjoy a plethora of different fragrances with scents such as Lavender, Lily of the Valley or Vanilla and Compound Floral and Fruity. If you love fragrance diffusers, you truly will not want to miss out on these delectable scents that freshen up your environment! Anti-clogging Reeds Bring Stronger Fragrance Reed sticks aka diffuser reeds are simply the conduits or carrier channels for your reed diffuser oil. By wicking up the scented diffuser oil from inside the bottle, carrying it to the top surface of these non-cloying reeds and releasing the fragrance into the air. flame-free way to spread your favorite fragrance throughout your environment. That’s because reed diffusers require no heat source to release wonderful aroma, making them safe for use in classrooms, offices, and homes—especially those with small children. Great Compliment to Any Interior Decor A stylish and modern design vessel that matches the decor. Many reed diffuser containers look great, but they don’t all throw fragrance as effectively as the ones Binca Vidou has designed specifically for this purpose. Custom created to bloom fragrance evenly and enduringly, Binca Vidou reed diffuser vessels are crafted to hold an optimal level of diffuser oil. The opening is also the ideal size for diffusing fragrance as the reeds can extend from the vessel at least as much as the vessel’s height. Harmless Aromatherapy Treatment Reed diffusers aren't overwhelming. Have you ever walked into a room and been overwhelmed by a fragrance product? A lot of people have and it’s not very pleasant. With sprays and other types of scent products, it can be easy to overdo, but with reed diffusers, this is unlikely to happen. Reed diffusers emit the perfect amount of subtle fragrance into your environment, without overwhelming you with the scent. Immersed in a fresh scent is a great way to help you recover and rejuvenate from low sleep quality last night and boost your work efficiency and productivity at day. Easy Scent Control with Reeds Controlling the intensity of the fragrance is nothing but a piece of cake with the fiber reeds. To either heighten or lessen the fragrance level, simply increase or decrease the number of reeds placed in your vessel. Remember to turn your reeds over when the scent stops diffusing. When they finally do not respond to turning, it’s time to replace with fresh reeds. Easy Open with Clear Instruction 1. Use your hand or tools like forceps to remove the plastic cork out gently. 2. Put as many reeds as you want in the vessel and let the oil evaporates slowly. 3. Keep it away from the reach of small hands and paws. 4. Avoid any direct sunlight and open flame. Applaud for the Long-lasting Fragrance There are many factors that contribute to how long the oils last. Air conditioning, heating, closed doors, open doors, dehumidifiers, etc. However, we have found that our 100ml diffuser oil should last for at least 30 days with 4 reeds, but ultimately this will depend on the temperature of the environment and the numbers of the reeds.
